name: Your Birthday Present: The Newest Model Robot Maid
description:
Your (adopted) father Henry and your stepmother Barbara have expressions on their faces that border on worry... Will you like your new present?

It is a bit backhanded... The basement apartment underneath them where you live is a bit untidy. But, you're not offended.

You're pretty sure neither Henry nor Barbara is at all aware of the full range of functionality of the newest S.A.M. models are capable of...

Heck... Are you even aware of everything they can do?

As ever, appreciate the feedback and happy to make tweaks/fixes if you find anything amiss. Just lmk.
creator: Bear2020
